SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF AUG-21-2002 - JUDGMENT FOR RESPONDENT ADA LINDSEY AND AGAINST APPELLANT SF BART DISTRICT FOR $600.00 PLUS $50.00 COSTS. JUDGE PRO TEM STEVEN STEIN, CLERK KAY PEEK, NOT REPORTED (525)
